caption: A televised news segment from News18 India features a press conference setting where several people are seated behind a long white table adorned with floral arrangements. A woman in a white outfit is seated centrally, while a man in a white shirt and a man in a dark suit are positioned to her right. The scene remains static across the sequence, though the on-screen graphics and text overlays change. In the initial frames, the top banner asks "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" and a side panel labels a man as "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार". As the sequence progresses, the top banner changes to "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है". The "BREAKING NEWS" ticker runs across the bottom in bold yellow and red lettering, and the time is consistently displayed as "10:08 PM". Small inset portraits of "संतोष सुमन" and "सुमित कुमार" appear on the right side of the screen.
